creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Does ruby work OK? Can't reproduce here.

Builds fine here on my vanilla 10.3 amd64 poudriere jail.
https://brnrd.eu/poudriere/build.html?mastername=103amd64-svn&build=2016-07-03_22h41m45s
No errors building ruby 2.2.5 either.

Can't really test this on my local system as I have LibreSSL in base.
